zh.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard是Robert Fossard I的女兒，於大約1100年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾赫頓 姆爾格拉福。她與Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1164年在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard是Robert Fossard I的女儿，于大约1100年出生在英国英格兰越可爾赫頓 姆爾格拉福。她与Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1164年在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from the Old French personal name Fossard.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard was born about 1100, in Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Fossard I. She married Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1164, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard est née environ 1100, à Hutton Mulgrave, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Fossard I. Elle a épousé Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1164, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England: Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard wurde um 1100 in Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Fossard I geboren. Sie hat Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1164 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard è nata il circa 1100 nel Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Fossard I. Lei sposato Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1164, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Staindrop, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Fossardは約1100年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハットオン ムルグラブでRobert Fossard Iの娘として生まれた。Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1164年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard(은)는 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 뮐그레이브에서 Robert Fossard I의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Robert Fossard I. Ela casou-se com Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1164, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England: Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Emma Fossard родилась около 1100 г. в местности хуттон мулграв, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Fossard I. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1164 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.
